Metadata.title: Riviera Hearth — Hotel Chimney & Hearth Care in Cancún
Metadata.description: Premium chimney, fireplace and ventilation cleaning for hotels and resorts across Cancún and the Riviera Maya. Certified, insured, and discreet — with zero guest disruption.
Metadata.servicesDesc: Chimney sweeping, safety inspection, creosote removal, ventilation cleaning and maintenance plans for hotels across the Riviera Maya.
Metadata.galleryDesc: A look at the resorts, lounges and venues we keep clean, safe and smoke-free across Cancún and the Riviera Maya.
Metadata.beforeAfterDesc: See the difference our chimney and ventilation service makes, in short before-and-after videos.
Metadata.aboutDesc: Riviera Hearth is a hospitality-focused chimney and ventilation cleaning company serving Cancún and the Riviera Maya.
Metadata.contactDesc: Request a free quote or schedule a service. Call, email, WhatsApp, or send us a message.

Hero.title: Spotless chimneys for the Riviera Maya's finest hotels.
Hero.subtitle: Certified chimney, fireplace and ventilation cleaning designed for hospitality — carried out discreetly, on your schedule, with zero disruption to your guests.
Hero.trust: Trusted by 200+ hotels and resorts across Cancún and the Riviera Maya.

ServicesPreview.title: Complete chimney & ventilation care
ServicesPreview.subtitle: One specialist team for every flue, fireplace, kitchen extraction and ventilation system on your property.

Services.title: Our services
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive chimney, fireplace and ventilation care for hotels, resorts and restaurants.
Services.intro: From routine sweeping to full safety certification, we keep every fireplace, flue and extraction system on your property clean, efficient and compliant — protecting your guests, your staff and your reputation.

sweeping.title: Chimney Sweeping
sweeping.description: Thorough, dust-controlled sweeping of flues and fireplaces using professional equipment that leaves no trace in your guest spaces.

inspection.title: Inspection & Safety Certification
inspection.description: Camera-assisted inspection of every flue, with a documented safety report and compliance certificate for your records and insurers.

creosote.title: Soot & Creosote Removal
creosote.description: Removal of flammable creosote and soot build-up — the leading cause of chimney fires — restoring safe, efficient draft.

ventilation.title: Ventilation & Duct Cleaning
ventilation.description: Deep cleaning of kitchen extraction hoods, ducts and ventilation systems to improve air quality and meet fire-safety codes.

caps.title: Caps, Liners & Spark Arrestors
caps.description: Supply and installation of chimney caps, liners and spark arrestors to keep out rain, wildlife and embers year-round.

emergency.title: 24/7 Emergency Response
emergency.description: Blocked flue, smoke in a suite, or a failed inspection before opening? Our priority response team is on call around the clock.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Plans
maintenance.description: Scheduled, hassle-free maintenance with seasonal visits, priority booking and transparent reporting across your whole property.

Features.title: Why hotels choose Riviera Hearth
Features.subtitle: We are built around the way hospitality works — not the other way around.

certified.title: Certified & Insured
certified.description: Fully certified technicians and comprehensive liability insurance, with documented compliance on every visit.

hospitality.title: Hospitality-Grade
hospitality.description: Uniformed, background-checked crews who work discreetly around guests and protect every surface they touch.

response.title: Fast Response
response.description: Flexible scheduling and 24/7 emergency cover so a chimney issue never delays an opening or disturbs a stay.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Team
bilingual.description: A fully bilingual (English/Spanish) team that communicates clearly with your managers and your guests alike.

Process.title: How it works
Process.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from first call to final certificate.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Tell us about your property and needs by phone, email or the contact form. We respond the same day.

assess.title: On-site assessment
assess.description: We survey your fireplaces, flues and ventilation, then send a clear, itemised quote — no surprises.

service.title: Cleaning & service
service.description: Our crew works on your schedule, discreetly and cleanly, with full protection of guest areas.

certify.title: Report & certificate
certify.description: You receive a photo report and a safety certificate for your records, insurers and inspectors.

Testimonials.title: What our clients say
Testimonials.subtitle: Hospitality teams across the Riviera Maya trust us with their properties.

oceanview.quote: Riviera Hearth handles all of our fireplaces and kitchen extraction. Punctual, spotless, and our guests never even notice they were here.

palmas.quote: The safety certificates made our annual inspection effortless. A genuinely professional, bilingual team we rely on every season.

celeste.quote: Fast, discreet and meticulous. They cleared a blocked flue the night before a full house — true emergency service.

About.title: About Riviera Hearth
About.subtitle: Hospitality-focused chimney and ventilation care, born on the Riviera Maya.
About.lead: We keep the fires, flues and ventilation of the Riviera Maya's finest properties clean, safe and compliant — so hospitality teams can focus on their guests.
About.story1: Riviera Hearth began with a simple observation: the resorts and boutique hotels of Cancún and the Riviera Maya deserve a chimney and ventilation specialist that understands hospitality. Smoke in a suite, a failed inspection, or grease in a kitchen duct isn't just a maintenance issue — it's a guest-experience and safety issue.
About.story2: Today our certified, bilingual crews care for fireplaces, flues and extraction systems across the region. We work on your schedule, protect every guest space, and document everything — combining the rigour of a safety contractor with the discretion the best hotels expect.
About.mission: To set the standard for chimney and ventilation safety in hospitality across the Riviera Maya — clean, certified, and invisible to your guests.

safety.title: Safety first
safety.description: Every job is measured against fire-safety standards and documented — never a shortcut where guests and staff are concerned.

discretion.title: Quiet professionalism
discretion.description: We work around your operation, not through it: clean, uniformed, and gone before the lobby fills up.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We show up when we say we will, and our reporting means you always know exactly what was done.

About.serviceArea: We serve hotels, resorts and restaurants across Cancún, Playa del Carmen, Tulum, Puerto Morelos and the wider Riviera Maya.
About.certifications: Our technicians are trained to international chimney-safety standards, and every visit is fully insured and documented.
